title: The Elf of Tokyo
overview: The lazy elven “goddess” of Takamimi Shrine frustrates Koito to no end. Elda may be an airhead who cares more about video games than duty, but she’s got a good heart.

title: Let's Go to Monja Street
overview: Elda has been a collector for centuries. Unfortunately, one thing never changes: luck is a cruel mistress.

title: The New Priestess and the Ritual of Succession
overview: Koito and Elda may have their differences, but they have at least one thing in common: a hankering for SNACKS!

title: The Elf Battle of All Times and Places
overview: Elda wasn’t the only one who got isekai’d. Another elf found herself on Earth, too!

title: Tsukishima Girls’ Collection
overview: Koito gives Elda a device known only as “The Smartphone,” a choice she will soon learn to regret. Later, Koito realizes Elda has an unchanging wardrobe.

title: Stand by Me
overview: Koito could ace a history test if a centuries-old elf helps her study, right? Later, Elda, who hates heights, must do a ritual at Tokyo Skytree, the tallest tower in Japan.

title: The Aroma of the Town
overview: How did people entertain themselves in the good old days? Elda knows–she was there. Later, the elusive Golden Frog Panzer may finally be within Elda’s grasp at long last!

title: Her and the Elf’s Situation
overview: A third isekai’d elf is in town! At first glance, Haira is elegant and is truly the elf of all elves… if it wasn’t for her serious gambling problem.

title: Time After Time
overview: It’s raining and a leak in the roof threatens the integrity of Elda’s precious collection! During the cleanup, Koito discovers an old videotape containing a recording of…

title: The Elves and Miko of 3 Cities
overview: Elves may be different from humans, but even they have their daily routines, wants and desires.

title: Detective Koma-chan
overview: Not only is Elda’s prized limited edition model gone, she’s convinced someone stole it. This looks like a job for Great Detective Koma!

title: This Is My Shrine Deity
overview: A ritual promises a generous bounty from the sea, but only if Koito can hit the archery target during the Yumimimi Festival. Too bad she has a horrible aim.
